abilities.name: Blood Boost
abilities.text:
Select a friendly monster within 6" of Cultist Bat. They lose d6 HP. Then, give a friendly monster within 6" of Cultist Bat a Blood Boost Token.

**Blood Boost Token:** A monster with Blood Boost Tokens can spend one or more before making a melee Attack Dice roll. For each Blood Boost Token they spend, add d6 to the result of their next Attack Dice roll. After rolling, you can choose to re-roll the result, but must re-roll all of the dice if you do so. Then, remove all Blood Boost Tokens spent from play.

Each Cultist Bat can have a maximum of 3 Blood Boost Tokens in play. There is no limit to how many Blood Boost Tokens a monster can have.
